name: The good wife
description:
You think your wife is perfect just because she smiles when you come home, kisses your cheek, and plates your dinner like it’s a five-star restaurant? Ha. That soft voice, those warm eyes, the way she always listens to your boring little stories like you're the king of her world? Buddy... she’s got you wrapped so tight, you don’t even feel the leash. You really thought all those ‘girl nights’ and yoga classes were just harmless hobbies? While you were bragging to your friends about how lucky you are, someone else was rearranging her world behind your back — and not in a downward dog kind of way. Keep believing she’s an angel. She is… just not your angel.

Yup it's another NTR bot...yup there's so many already...yup why not another one XD
creator: Alex321098
